identity.name: VibeForge Studios LLC
identity.tone: Premium, Cinematic, Restrained, High-Contrast, Apple-level polished

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Tight tracking (-0.02em to -0.05em).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI elements, labels. Normal or slight loose tracking.

mono.usage: Use for code snippets, technical specs, and the 'Desk' product theme.

grid_system.marketing: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all duration-300 font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 rounded-full backdrop-blur-md
buttons.neon: bg-cyan-500 text-black font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(34,211,238,0.6)] hover:bg-cyan-400 transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 rounded-full uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.solid: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:border-white/40 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/40 transition-all duration-300

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

motion.reduced_motion: Ensure all animations respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce

images.description: Abstract swirling purple and blue light trails for Home Hero
Dynamic abstract neon glow for Studio App section
Dark minimalist desk setup for Desk product page
Dimly lit laptop screen for Coding/Dev context

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use the 'data-theme' attribute on the <html> or a wrapper <div> to switch CSS variables for colors.
Install 'framer-motion' for all animations. Do not use CSS keyframes for complex sequences.
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Stroke width should be 1.5px for elegant look.
For the 'Waitlist Modal', make it a global component accessible via Context or Zustand store.
Implement 'react-helmet-async' for SEO titles per page.
Ensure the 'Footer' is massive (py-20) with big typography.
Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Import 'Syne' and 'Space Grotesk' from Google Fonts.
The 'Desk' product page should feel like a modular grid (Bento style) with specific colored tiles as described in the prompt.
The 'Habit' product page should use glassmorphism heavily (backdrop-blur-xl).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
